constraints.layout: Formal. Solid dark left bars or headers. Sophisticated and authoritative.

chart_rules.native_shapes: MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE with sharp corners. Thin, elegant connecting lines. Use formal table layouts for data.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Blueprint, minimal, architectural, isometric with gold/navy accents.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Corporate, professional, high-end, subtle, elegant lighting, NO TEXT

constraints.layout: Grid-based layout, extreme alignment, use of crosshairs and small technical labels.

chart_rules.native_shapes: MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE with sharp corners. Thin neon grid lines. Monospace data labels.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Cyber-minimalism, dark mode terminal, blueprint wireframes, precise.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Cyberpunk, minimal, dark mode, glowing lines, data matrix, precise, NO TEXT

typography.chinese: 思源黑體 Bold (Source Han Sans Bold)

constraints.layout: Split screens (e.g. half yellow, half black), massive typography, extreme contrast.

chart_rules.native_shapes: Massive geometric blocks. Thick connecting lines. High contrast colored data bars.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Bold poster graphic, extreme contrast wireframe, aggressive 3D structure.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Bold, dynamic, high contrast, poster style, striking, NO TEXT

constraints.layout: Card-based UI, subtle drop shadows, clear visual hierarchy, ample padding.

chart_rules.native_shapes: MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE (radius 12px). Distinct layers, flat colors with one vibrant accent.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Material design, clean UI dashboard, layered cards, soft light, vector illustration.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Material design, clean, flat illustration, corporate UI, clear, NO TEXT

anthropic_modern_sans.name: Anthropic 現代無襯線風 (Modern Sans-Serif)

constraints.layout: Lots of whitespace, modern cards, simple lines, horizontal rules.

chart_rules.native_shapes: MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE. Clean horizontal Gantt charts. Spacious flowcharts.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Flat Vector, Isometric 3D Glassmorphism, clean digital UI, pure background.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Clean, flat design, modern, bright, relatable, NO TEXT

constraints.layout: Vibrant, asymmetrical grid, large bold headers, strong color contrasts.

chart_rules.yaml_style: Modern app design, vibrant colors, soft shadows, 3D claymorphism.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Vibrant, startup, clean, 3D abstract, modern tech, NO TEXT

anthropic_tech_ui.name: Anthropic 科技介面風 (Tech UI Modern)

constraints.layout: Modern UI cards, spacious margins, clean web-like layout.

chart_rules.yaml_style: Flat UI, modern web design, smooth gradients, Apple-like minimalism.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Clean, UI/UX, tech, bright, modern, minimalist, NO TEXT

consulting_analysis.name: Consulting Analysis
consulting_analysis.typography: Professional sans-serif like Arial or Helvetica. Every slide must have a full-sentence Action Title.

constraints.layout: 2-column or 3-column grids. Use strict alignment, traditional consulting matrix tables, and clear visual hierarchy.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: N/A - Do not generate AI images. Use clean PPT shapes, structural diagrams, or data tables.

swiss_deconstruct.name: Swiss Deconstructivism
swiss_deconstruct.typography: Arial Black or Helvetica Black. Extremely large typography. Brutalist scale.

constraints.max_text_density: Minimalist. Treat text as art and geometry.
constraints.layout: Asymmetrical, brutalist, broken grid. Large overlapping text and solid red rectangles.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: No AI images. Use only typography and geometric vector shapes.

tech_minimal.name: Tech Minimalist
tech_minimal.typography: Large, bold headings. Google Sans or similar modern sans-serif.

constraints.max_text_density: Very Low. Use one big idea per slide.
constraints.layout: Frameless design, massive negative space. No traditional grid tables; use modern cards.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: abstract, 3D render, dark background, glowing neon, futuristic, clean, NO TEXT, highly aesthetic

structural_minimalism.name: 結構化極簡 (Structural Minimalism) / 專業顧問風

constraints.max_text_density: Structured. Clear logical hierarchy with concepts vs details.
constraints.layout: Eliminate unnecessary decoration. Strict grids, sharp alignment, geometric cuts. High reliance on native shapes for logic diagrams. Title: 44-54pt, Subtitle: 24-32pt, Body: 16-20pt (line height 1.2-1.5).

chart_rules.native_shapes: Strict geometry, logic flowcharts, high contrast structural shapes.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Minimalist, flat vector, structured, clear hierarchy.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Minimalist, flat vector, clean sharp lines, solid background, NO TEXT, no complex 3D rendering, highly structured.

organic_narrative.name: 有機敘事 (Organic Narrative) / 沉浸式氛圍

typography.chinese: 明體/宋體 (Source Han Serif) for Titles, 現代黑體 (Source Han Sans Light) for Body

constraints.layout: Full-bleed backgrounds with blurred borders. Text floats on canvas with generous horizontal/vertical whitespace. Use large serif numbers (01, 02) as visual anchors. Title: 48pt+, Body: 14-18pt.

chart_rules.native_shapes: Organic placement, cards that blend into the background, soft opacity.
chart_rules.yaml_style: Immersive exhibition catalog, organic narrative, elegant.

visuals.image_prompt_rules: Abstract flowing liquid marble, organic soft waves, two-tone smooth gradient of soft sage green and warm sandy beige, smoky silk texture, soft diffused lighting, tranquil and ethereal atmosphere, NO TEXT.
